programme.title: E94
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E30 - In Fougeres (Best Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the programme in Fougeres.

programme.title: E1 - Spring As The Water Flows
programme.desc: In spring, the most beautiful Swiss lakes reveal all their charm. Whether on the waters of Lake Sils in the Engadin Valley, or on the Riviera shores of Lake Geneva, locals and tourists make the most of the season to enjoy a moment in harmony with nature.

programme.title: E6 - Social Security/Farmers/Olympics/Audio Naturalist
programme.desc: On the agenda: alarm bells for Social Security in France; after outbreaks of lumpy skin disease, farmers try to rebuild their herds; mascots made in Ille et Vilaine for the Milan-Cortina Olympics; a meeting with an audio naturalist...

programme.title: E1 - All American Marinara
programme.desc: Imagine a world where marinara sauce isn't part of the American palate. That was true sixty years ago, when food conglomerate Campbell's kickstarted what would become an Italian American food revolution.

programme.desc: Durian season is an annual celebration in Southeast Asia. From the surprising kampung types to the glamorous clones and the mysterious wild species – nothing beats durian!

programme.desc: Welcome to the unreal truth about everyday products of the past that were way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye. Sensational items like mail-order dynamite and radioactive dishes.

programme.desc: The death of one of history's most enigmatic rulers-Egypt's King Tutankhamun-remains unsolved. No one knows what ended his life, but scientific advancements may be getting us closer to the answer.

programme.title: The Rolling Pin Quest

programme.title: Astoria and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Rose and Hawk's first day of Heroism Class includes dueling monsters and saving damsels. Astoria takes charge to show her grandmother that a modern Rapunzel doesn't wait to be rescued. On a mission for a golden egg, they face traps, a giant, and a sinister magic hen.

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Mermaids
programme.desc: Ant is determined to find out what the mermaid-shaped thing is swimming outside the Aronnax. The search leads him straight to the pirates.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Origami Box
programme.desc: How can you carry stuff with a sheet of paper? See what that paper can hold with a few simple folds!

programme.title: Smart House
programme.desc: When Mundi is asked to house-sit a really special home, Doki wonders what's so special about it? They head over to the ‘smart house' across the lake, to find out! It turns out to be a high-tech house, full of interconnected gadgets.

programme.title: How Spacecraft Missions End
programme.desc: Countless spacecraft, such as Cassini and Galileo, have made invaluable discoveries in our solar system – but they can't last forever. Who decides when and how to end their missions? Host Emily Calandrelli speaks to NASA scientists at the heart of these decisions.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Well Buttered
programme.desc: Eric uses marbles to make butter out of cream. He learns how butter used to be made and how it is made today.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Sometimes Gabi takes winning way too seriously. Doki wonders - does Gabi really have to win, to have fun? To find out, they set off to the ‘One of a Kind Game Kingdom' at the Silly Sports Park in Japan, where the games are as goofy as they are unique.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: It's Mai Castle
programme.desc: When Yoko's magic turns Mai's castle into a life-size fortress just for her, Mai learns that sometimes it's more fun to play together.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Origami Box
programme.desc: How can you carry stuff with a sheet of paper? See what that paper can hold with a few simple folds!

programme.title: Rockets
programme.desc: With simple rockets made out of stuff from the hardware store, you can become a do-it-yourself NASA. In this episode host Steve Spangler shows how to make high-flying rockets using nothing but soda bottles, balloons, vinegar, and straws.

programme.title: Well Buttered
programme.desc: Eric uses marbles to make butter out of cream. He learns how butter used to be made and how it is made today.

programme.title: E1 - Festive Special
programme.desc: Carrot, Potato, Parsnip and Brussels Sprout perform the festive classic Auld Lang Syne.

programme.title: E4 - Weather Balloons
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E5 - Mud
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E11 - Seacow Snow Trail
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck are keen to find out who delivered their Christmas presents to them.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: Saas Bahu Aur Sensex
programme.desc: Upper middle-class women quit daytime soaps to start investing in the stock market, seeking financial independence, new skills, and chances to shape their futures. Release Year: 2008 Director: Shona Urvashi

programme.title: Bandhan (1998)
programme.desc: Unable to bear a child, Pooja is asked to compromise with her husband's new mistress or leave the house. Pooja's brother, Raju, decides to fight for her and reunite her with her husband. Release Year: 1998 Director: N.R. Acharya

programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: E4 - Staff Training
programme.desc: The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there’s a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai’s food offerings.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E9 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: With the help of a local Oklahoma guide, Jess sets out to hunt an axis deer, then shares butchery techniques and prepares a delicious backstrap grilled over live fire.

programme.title: E1 - Bangkok
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: E2 - Darwin
programme.desc: Jack takes inspiration from the 1700s for his latest adventure. In Darwin, Australia, he gets creative with crocodile and mud crab when he realises he’s missed shrimp season.

programme.title: E5 - Big Stone Fever
programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E4 - Staff Training
programme.desc: The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there’s a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai’s food offerings.

programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: E516 - Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: E312 - Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: E802 - Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: E611 - The Holiday House Part 2
programme.desc: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy. Everyone is talking in a different language and Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult.

programme.title: E210 - The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: E717 - Surfing
programme.desc: On their second day in Australia the Kangaroo family take the Peppa and Family to the beach where they try surfing for the first time.

programme.title: E1124 - Pups Save Captain Crinkle Cut / Pups Save The Big Nightlight
programme.desc: Alex's french-fry costume gets him carried off by a flock of hungry seagulls. // Humdinger and Kitties take the lighthouse from Seal Island.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: E207 - The Barbapapa Family / The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: E603 - Pups Save A Melon Festival / Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his 'melon' bounces away, causing chaos all over town! // When Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge, it's up to the pups to lower them to safety!

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E152 - School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: E201 - Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E620 - George's Balloon
programme.desc: George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.title: E623 - Peppa's Circus
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden. Peppa and her friends decide it's a perfect place to put on a circus. With Peppa as the ringmaster, the show can begin!

programme.title: E120 - Sneezing Cold
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call, Blaze's friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: E204 - Pups Save The Diving Bell / Pups Save The Beavers
programme.desc: While the Turbots are deep sea diving, their diving bell ends up stuck! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A storm washes away a beaver's dam, so he chomps all the wood at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol arrives to help rebuild his home!

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 2
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Kintetsu Railway Yamada Line, Toba Line & Shima Line
programme.desc: Actor Rokkaku Seiji, a lover of both trains and good drinks, sets out on a rail journey around the world. At each stop, he wanders through the towns and explores whatever catches his eye. Sit back and enjoy this fun-filled railroad trip, accompanied by the music he personally selects!

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

Former Miss South Africa Shudufhadzo Musida Opens Up On Mental Health Issue
programme.desc: Did you know that former Miss South Africa Shudufhadzo Musida only entered the competition to fulfill a promise to a friend? For our season finale, host Nozibele Qamngana Mayaba quizzes Shudufhadzo on how getting a grip on her mental health literally helped her achieve her potential.

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 1
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: E10 - Meme Kids Took The Miata. We're Taking It Back
programme.desc: Back in the day, the Miata was a cute roadster, before evolving into a fun, stylish track car. Today, TikTok memes and dancing headlights have tarnished its rep.

programme.title: E2 - Dirty Desert
programme.desc: A few teams suffered disastrous consequences in the opening rounds. Team MR2-D2 didn't even make the eliminator event, while Team Mob-Z shredded their driveshaft.

programme.title: E13 - Rising Waters
programme.desc: As floodwaters surge, Goodson All-Terrain escapes to higher ground. With the future uncertain, Bobby struggles to keep the wood moving and his crew working.

programme.title: E1 - Ram Tow, '49 Ford Show
programme.desc: Form matches function as Bill and his team customize a 2023 Dodge Ram truck so that it can win awards while still performing like a truck.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum

programme.title: E1 - Lady Elliot Island
programme.desc: Lady Elliot Island is the crown jewel of the Great Barrier Reef- the largest living structure on Earth. This southern-most island of the Reef chain is home to dizzying swirls of colour, life and diversity both above and below the water.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E10 - The Pantanal
programme.desc: The Pantanal experiences extreme climatic shifts, from brutal droughts during the searingly hot dry season to floods created by rainy-season tempests. See how the region’s diverse animal population works to coexist and ensure collective survival.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: CNBC Sports

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two mismatched New York City detectives seize an opportunity to step up like the city's top cops, whom they idolize, only things don't quite go as planned.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: A widower's son calls a radio talk show in an attempt to find his father a partner.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E11 - 五強集結完成
programme.desc: 由周杰倫擔當音樂造夢者，召集夢想生活官劉畊宏和夢想見證官王鶴棣，及四組廠牌經理人GAI周延&布瑞吉Bridge、歐陽靖&小鬼王琳凱、艾熱&早安、VaVa&盛宇，一同為說唱新生代們的追夢之旅保駕護航；打破傳統導師帶隊模式，通過構建真實師徒關系，共同打造獨具特色的說唱廠牌；透過競演激發說唱歌手創作才華，在全民中尋找下一個說唱巨星。

programme.title: E12 - 新老好友燃情開唱
programme.desc: 節目煥新升級，打破原有賽制，以「聽世界的聲音，唱我們的歌」為主題，廣邀了劉宇寧、毛不易、馬嘉祺、古巨基、李克勤、騰格爾、龔琳娜等三十多位歌手平行演繹，回歸音樂本質，共同打造融合金曲，為歌手之間的合作與交流提供更多的可能性，打造充滿無限活力的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E9 - 男女對唱演繹愛的訣別
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E8 - 尤長靖跪地連飆三段高音
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E1 - 「極挑團」乘坐18小時火車勇闖漠河
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E11 - 五強集結完成
programme.desc: 由周杰倫擔當音樂造夢者，召集夢想生活官劉畊宏和夢想見證官王鶴棣，及四組廠牌經理人GAI周延&布瑞吉Bridge、歐陽靖&小鬼王琳凱、艾熱&早安、VaVa&盛宇，一同為說唱新生代們的追夢之旅保駕護航；打破傳統導師帶隊模式，通過構建真實師徒關系，共同打造獨具特色的說唱廠牌；透過競演激發說唱歌手創作才華，在全民中尋找下一個說唱巨星。

programme.title: E12 - 新老好友燃情開唱
programme.desc: 節目煥新升級，打破原有賽制，以「聽世界的聲音，唱我們的歌」為主題，廣邀了劉宇寧、毛不易、馬嘉祺、古巨基、李克勤、騰格爾、龔琳娜等三十多位歌手平行演繹，回歸音樂本質，共同打造融合金曲，為歌手之間的合作與交流提供更多的可能性，打造充滿無限活力的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E34 - : Fighting Cancer (Ep 1): My Fight Begins
programme.desc: Fighting Cancer follows three young Singaporeans with stage 4 cancer as they battle survival while juggling treatment, family, and work, revealing their resilience in the face of uncertainty.

programme.title: The Movie Emperor
programme.desc: The Hong Kong movie star Lau Wai-chi misses out again on the Hong Kong film awards. He sits in his office, making short videos that pay tribute to the characters he has played over his forty-year career. But trying to regain popularity this way feels desperate and cheap. He needs to make a film again. He contacts Chinese director Lin Hao, as he wants to star in a film shot in the countryside, playing an ordinary farmer, something he has never done before. This film he thinks will help restore his career to glory. Yet he is so used to being a movie star and having a special treatment in his everyday life, that it is hard for him to connect with the people of the street or peasants, people who have a lower social status than him. Even with women, there seems to exist an impassable barrier. For his new role to be successful, he needs to learn from the villagers how they really live and speak. But they see through his arrogance and vanity – as does the crew. The big star is nobod

programme.title: The Medium
programme.desc: A horrifying story of a shaman's inheritance in the Isan region of Thailand. What could be possessing a family member might not be the Goddess they make it out to be. A documentary team follows Nim, a shaman based in Northern Thai, the Isan area, and encounters her niece Mink showing strange symptoms that seem to be of inheritance of shamanism. The team decides to follow Mink, hoping to capture the shaman lineage passing on to the next generation, but her bizarre behavior becomes more extreme.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Last Night Ever
programme.desc: In this episode, “Night King” Dayo Wong and Director Jack Ng reveal their personal experiences in nightclubs. While Dayo shares his 'bitterness' of being surrounded by the ladies and unveils the intricate storylines in the film, they also discuss about the differences between “Night King” and previous nightclub movies, allowing everyone to appreciate the film from various perspectives.

programme.title: Wine War
programme.desc: Shui Zhang and Waley were buddies at an orphanage. Adopted by a French couple and moved to France at a young age, Waley has become a wine connoisseur prodigy. Left alone in China, Shui Zhang grows up to be a braggart and a nobody. When Shui Zhang travels to France one day to enlist Waley's help in auctioning a bottle of red wine called 'The God of Wine,' said to contain Kublai Khan's secret wine-brewing recipe, Waley accepted the challenge in a heartbeat. During the auction, Waley encounters a representative from the seller, the beautiful Yvonne, and falls in love with her at first sight. The other potential buyer is the wealthy and imposing coal tycoon Changfang Fang. While he appears to be a rich and vulgar brute on the surface, he is much more than meets the eyes. Adding to the mystery is the private connoisseur of suspicious origins following Fang everywhere. To Waley's surprise, Zhang and Fang seem to be sharing secrets between themselves. The group of buyers set off an

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Up for the Rising Sun
programme.desc: Han Zhiyi‘s father took his life after he was rigged by Yi Zufen and Zhiyi was forced to close down her family business. She was distressed and went for a vacation with her mother. programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: By the early twenty centuries, there was a great disaster in Guang Xi. The myth of ghosts and plagues were overwhelmingly perplexed people in the Phoenix City. In order to ease the pain of the villagers, a medical group were commanded to stay in the Church of the Phoenix City. Unfortunately, the church was actually the home of the ghosts...

programme.title: The Legend of Speed
programme.desc: After winning yet another race, the underground drag car racer king, Sky, was framed by his rival's brother Hung. On the run in Thailand, Sky hooks up with his long lost father, himself a legendary racer, who steers his son back on course for the ultimate showdown of speed with Hung.
